candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue label; preferred as a reported revenue line that can serve as priority choice.
Also a valid top-line sales label and appears numerically identical to Total Revenue in shown years; useful as fallback across periods.

variables.notes: Using revenue priority list per instructions; do not sum.

candidates.why: Direct input/material cost on the income statement; best match for cost of sales among candidates.
Inventory asset subline on the balance sheet, not an expense; not appropriate for COGS.

variables.notes: Selected income statement expense line; excluded balance sheet inventory row.

candidates.why: Operating overhead-type expense and populated; good SG&A component.
Personnel cost overhead and populated; good SG&A component.
Potential overhead bucket, but appears unpopulated in preview and may overlap with other expense lines.
Balance sheet accrual, not an income statement operating expense; not suitable for SG&A expense mapping.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row exists. Selected best overhead buckets from the income statement and excluded depreciation/amortization, COGS, and balance sheet rows.

candidates.why: This indicates capitalized R&D investment, not current R&D expense.
Explicit R&D expense line; best semantic match.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization, not current-period R&D expense; excluded by rule.
Balance sheet asset, not expense.
Balance sheet gross asset subline, not expense.
Balance sheet amortization contra-asset, not current R&D expense.

variables.notes: Chose explicit income statement R&D line; do not use capitalized development or amortization lines for XRD.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost line; usable fallback if explicit interest expense is missing.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses attributable to other borrowings
candidates.why: Most specific interest expense line and best match for XINT.
Interest expense subtype; useful fallback in periods where reported separately.
Too broad and less clearly interest-specific.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Interest expense subtype, supplemental disclosure; useful fallback.
Generic explicit interest expense label; good fallback if populated in some years.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses attributable to other borrowings
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority list ordered from most specific interest expense to broader finance-cost fallback; later code should take first non-missing value.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders
candidates.why: Preferred owner/parent equity line that excludes non-controlling interests, exactly matching BE rule.
This is minority interest, not BE.
Valid only as fallback when no parent/owner equity line exists; here parent equity exists.
Balancing/subtotal row, not preferred when explicit equity line exists.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred parent-equity line to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of earnings, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement allocation label, not preferred for balance sheet MIB.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation, not minority equity.
Exact balance sheet non-controlling interest line; best match for MIB.
Also a valid balance sheet minority interest label; useful fallback across periods.

variables.notes: Used balance sheet NCI lines as priority list; excluded income statement allocation lines.
